scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/web && npm run build -w packages/cli && npm run build -w packages/vscode
scripts.lint:eslint: eslint packages/core/src/adapters packages/core/src/domain packages/core/src/services packages/core/src/project-paths.ts packages/core/src/snapshot.ts packages/core/src/workload.ts packages/web/src/server packages/web/src/render packages/web/src/client/index.ts packages/web/src/server.ts packages/web/src/fleet-live-service.ts packages/web/src/router.ts packages/web/src/server-metadata.ts packages/web/src/server-options.ts packages/web/src/server-types.ts packages/cli/src packages/vscode/src scripts eslint.config.js
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run check:file-size && npm run check:boundaries && npm run typecheck && npm run test
